ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the topic (e.g., 'Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced') */,
  "prerequisite_topics" TEXT /* Prerequisite topics that students should be familiar with before starting this topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Correct answer */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard') */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the correct answer */,
  "references" TEXT /* References for further study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student account was last updated */,
  "enrolled_topics" TEXT /* List of topics in which the student is enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_sets" (
  "question_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question set */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who created the question set */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question set belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the question set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question set */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question set (e.g., 'Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_sets_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_sets_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_set_questions" (
  "question_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question set */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question within the question set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was added to the set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_set_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who made the attempt */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being attempted */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the student */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the answer was correct or not */,
  "attempted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student attempted the question */,
  "explanation_viewed" INTEGER /* Whether the student viewed the explanation after attempting the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attempt was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attempt record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_attempts_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_attempts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
